source:
"use client"; import React, { useState, Suspense } from 'react'; import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'; import { useAuth } from '@/context/AuthContext'; import Card from '@/components/ui/Card'; import Button from '@/components/ui/Button'; import { createSubscriptionSession } from '@/services/paymentService'; import { ShieldCheck, Crown, Building, CreditCard, CheckCircle2, ArrowRight, Shield, Lock, Globe, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'; import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'; const PLANS_DATA: Record = { PRO: { name: 'Individual Pro Explorer', monthly: 3.81, yearly: 42, icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-primary', bg: 'bg-primary/5' }, PREMIUM: { name: 'Individual Premium Mastery', monthly: 7.94, yearly: 90, icon: Crown, color: 'text-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-500/5' }, BUSINESS: { name: 'Institutional Bundle', monthly: 85.50, yearly: 855, icon: Building, color: 'text-indigo-600', bg: 'bg-indigo-600/5', seats: 30 } }; function CheckoutContent() { const router = useRouter(); const searchParams = useSearchParams(); const { user } = useAuth(); const planId = (searchParams.get('plan') || 'PRO').toUpperCase(); const cycle = searchParams.get('cycle') || 'monthly'; const seats = Number(searchParams.get('seats') || 0); const plan = PLANS_DATA[planId] || PLANS_DATA.PRO; const price = cycle === 'monthly' ? plan.monthly : plan.yearly; const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const handleConfirm = async () => { try { setLoading(true); const { url } = await createSubscriptionSession(planId as any, cycle as any, seats); window.location.href = url; } catch (err) { console.error(err); alert("Something went wrong with the secure gateway. Please retry."); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; return (
Checkout
{/* LEFT SIDE: DETAILS & PAYMENT METHOD */}
{/* Details Form UI (Simulation) */}

Checkout Basics

First Name

{user?.name?.split(' ')[0] || 'Member'}

Last Name

{user?.name?.split(' ')[1] || 'User'}

Email Address

{user?.email}

Country

United States
{/* Payment Method UI (The Embedded Feel) */}

Payment Method

Credit / Debit Card
VISA
MC

Card Number

Expiration

CVC

{/* RIGHT SIDE: ORDER SUMMARY */}

Order Summary

{/* Top Accent */}

{plan.name}

Membership Plan

${price.toFixed(2)}

{cycle}

Subtotal ${price.toFixed(2)}
Processing Fee Free
Total to Pay ${price.toFixed(2)}

Instant Access: Unlock all premium lessons, category modules, and tutor sessions immediately after payment.

); } export default function CheckoutPage() { return (
}> ); }

"use client"; import React, { useState } from "react"; import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; import { Mail, MapPin, Phone, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Globe, Zap, Award, ShieldCheck, Edit3, UserCircle } from "lucide-react"; import { useAuth } from "@/context/AuthContext"; import Button from "@/components/ui/Button"; import ProfileEditModal from "@/components/features/profile/ProfileEditModal"; export default function StudentProfile() { const { user, setUser, isLoading: authLoading } = useAuth(); const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false); const [message, setMessage] = useState({ type: "", text: "" }); if (authLoading) return (

Synchronizing Profile...

); if (!user) return (

Session identity required.

); const handleUpdateUser = (updatedUser: any) => { setUser(updatedUser); setMessage({ type: "success", text: "Profile updated successfully!" }); }; return (
{/* ── TOP HEADER SECTION ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
{user.profilePhoto ? ( ) : (
)}

{user.name}

Student Learner

{user.email}

Enrolled since

{new Date(user.createdAt || "").toLocaleDateString("en-GB", { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}

Level

{user.level || "Beginner"}

{/* ── LEARNING STATS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}

Performance Engine

Knowledge XP

{user.xp || 0}

Tokens / Credits

{user.credits || 0}

Curriculum progress

85%

Quick Connectivity

Mobile

{user.phoneNumber || "Not provided"}

Current Country

{user.country || "Earth"}

Membership Architecture

Active Plan

{user.subscription?.plan || "FREE"} Account

{user.subscription?.plan !== 'FREE' && user.subscription?.currentPeriodEnd && (

{new Date(user.subscription.currentPeriodEnd) > new Date() ? "Next Billing / Trial End" : "Last Period Ended"}

{new Date(user.subscription.currentPeriodEnd).toLocaleDateString("en-GB", { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}

)} {user.subscription?.plan === 'FREE' && ( )}
{/* ── BIOGRAPHY & INFO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}

Personal Background

{user.bio || "No biography provided yet. Tell us about your passion for Tamil culture!"}

Age Identity

{user.age ? `${user.age} Years Old` : "Confidential"}

Gender Perspective

{user.gender || "Not specified"}

{/* ── EDIT PROFILE MODAL ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */} {isEditing && ( setIsEditing(false)} role="student" /> )} {message.text && (
{message.type === 'success' ? : }

{message.text}

)}
); }

"use client"; import React, { useState } from "react"; import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; import { UserCircle, Mail, MapPin, Phone, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Edit3, Zap, Award, Banknote, Briefcase, GraduationCap, Clock, Layers } from "lucide-react"; import { useAuth } from "@/context/AuthContext"; import { api } from "@/lib/api"; import Button from "@/components/ui/Button"; import ProfileEditModal from "@/components/features/profile/ProfileEditModal"; export default function TutorProfileSettings() { const { user, setUser, isLoading: authLoading } = useAuth(); const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false); const [message, setMessage] = useState({ type: "", text: "" }); if (authLoading) return (

Accessing Mentor Profile...

); if (!user) return (

Authentication mismatch.

); const handleUpdateUser = (updatedUser: any) => { setUser(updatedUser); setMessage({ type: "success", text: "Profile refined successfully!" }); }; return (
{/* ── TOP HEADER SECTION ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
{user.profilePhoto ? ( ) : (
)}

{user.name}

Verified Language Mentor

{user.email}

{/* ── TEACHING STATS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}

Professional Metrics

1:1 Session ($)

${user.oneClassFee || 0}

8-Class Bundle ($)

${user.eightClassFee || 0}

Total Earnings

${user.credits || 0}

Trust Level

Verified

{[1,2,3,4,5].map(i => )}

Expertise Overview

Specialization

{user.specialization || "General Mentor"}

Experience

{user.experience || "Native Speaker"}

Weekly Teaching Schedule

{user.weeklySchedule ? (

Operating Hours

{user.weeklySchedule}

) : (

No specific hours set yet.

)}
{/* ── PROFESSIONAL BACKGROUND ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}

Academic & Teaching Bio

{user.bio || "Craft a professional bio to attract students seeking your expertise."}

Country

{user.country || "Earth"}

Age

{user.age || "N/A"}

Gender

{user.gender || "Any"}

Joined

{new Date(user.createdAt || "").toLocaleDateString("en-GB", { month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })}

{/* ── EDIT PROFILE MODAL ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */} {isEditing && ( setIsEditing(false)} role="teacher" /> )} {message.text && (
{message.type === 'success' ? : }

{message.text}

)}
); }

"use client"; import Link from "next/link"; import { useAuth } from "@/context/AuthContext"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; export default function TutorSupport() { const { user } = useAuth(); const router = useRouter(); return (
{/* Right Column (Text for flex-row-reverse, so it appears on right in code, left visually) wait, flex-row-reverse means first item goes right. So text is Left visually. Let's not use row-reverse to avoid confusion. */} {/* Left Column (Text) */}
Tutor support

Stuck on a Lesson?
Ask a Tutor.

When lessons get tough, don't struggle alone. Send a question directly to an expert Tamil tutor from within any lesson. Need deeper help? Book a private one-on-one class for personalized guidance.

  • Ask quick questions for free with your credits
  • Book private tutoring sessions (premium)
  • Tutors accept and answer within 24 hours
  • Choose from our team of verified Tamil experts
Explore Tutors
{/* Right Column (Mock UI) */}
Tutor support
{/* Student Question */}
Question

"How do I pronounce the 'zh' (ழ) sound in Tamil? I keep getting it wrong. Any tips?"

{/* Status Indicator */}
Accepted by Karthik R.
{/* Tutor Answer */}
KR
Tutor answer

"The 'zh' (ழ) sound is unique to Tamil. Place your tongue curled back toward the roof of your mouth, without touching it, and push air out firmly. Try saying 'Azhagu' slowly. I'll send an audio clip to help!"

{/* Audio clip preview mock */}
0:12
); }
